title: [Icemule Trail, Tundra]
description: The icy trail skirts the very edge of the deadly, partially frozen marsh.  Beside the trail lies the dead carcass of some unidentifiable animal--mute evidence that the marsh should be avoided at all costs.

wayto.2512: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northwest'
wayto.2514: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'south'
